---
listing:
  contents: posts/**/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
  max-description-length: 500
  feed: true
  image-align: right
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
